title: oxodium callosum
side_effects: Oxodium callosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of oxodium callosum can lead to anaphylaxis, organ damage, and even death. Additionally, improper handling of the plant may also cause gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and stomach cramps.
